content.text: Related contentWe cover function templates in lesson11.6 -- Function templates.
We cover function templates in lesson11.6 -- Function templates.

TipA better option is to avoid usingstd::vectorin cases where you need to assert on array length. Using a type that supportsconstexprarrays (e.g.std::array) is probably a better choice, as you canstatic_asserton the length of a constexpr array. We cover this in future lesson17.3 -- Passing and returning std::array.
